name: Low Calorie Squash Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the yellow squash and chopped onion together until tender. Drain off any excess water.
2. Beat the eggs and add flour, half of the grated cheese, salt, pepper, mustard, powdered milk, and margarine. Mix well.
3. Add the cooked squash mixture to a Pam-coated pie pan, stirring gently.
4. Bake in a 350 degree (F) oven for 25 minutes.
5. Remove from the oven and sprinkle with the remaining grated cheese.
6. Return to the oven and bake for an additional 5 minutes.
7. Makes 4 servings.
